CustomField.description: Number of Account records processed per batch execution during hard credit rollup calculations using the Customizable Rollups engine. Default is 200. Reduce if the batch job fails due to governor limits. Applies to the non-skew mode Account hard credit rollup job.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Accounts per batch during hard credit rollup calculations. Default is 200. Reduce if the rollup job hits governor limits.
CustomField.label: Account Hard Credit Batch Size
